hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: The Place Guesthouse Parys in Parys offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free toiletries.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace, in the garden, or by the year-round outdoor swimming pool. The property features an outdoor fireplace, lounge, and coffee shop.
Dining Experience: A full English or Irish breakfast is served daily. Additional amenities include a wellness package, evening entertainment, and live music.
Location and Attractions: Located 133 km from Lanseria Airport, the guesthouse is a 13-minute walk from Parys Golf & Country Estate. Nearby attractions include Vaal de Grace Golf Estate (4.5 km) and Sylviavale Heritage Museum (46 km).
